action_set_definitions.name: query_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves data from a central hub or registry. Used to find current operational priorities or assignments.

registry_id.description: The unique identifier for the registry (e.g., 'central_registry_hub').

key.description: The specific field or key to look up (e.g., 'priority_area').

action_set_definitions.name: lookup_area_hardware
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the specific device IDs associated with a given area name, identifying primary hardware like luminaires or acoustic units.

area_id.description: The name of the priority area discovered from the registry.

action_set_definitions.name: list_cluster_members
action_set_definitions.description: Identifies all hardware IDs belonging to a specific cluster or logical group (e.g., Alpha, Beta).

cluster_id.description: The name of the cluster to scan.

action_set_definitions.name: update_device_state
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the internal attributes of a specific device. Used for setting brightness, operation modes, or power status.

device_id.description: The ID of the target device.

value.description: The new value for the attribute.

action_set_definitions.name: set_active_scene
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the transition to a named scene configuration across the environment.

scene_name.description: The name of the scene to activate.

state_description.devices: A map of device IDs to their current attribute values.
state_description.active_scene: The name of the currently active configuration preset or 'none'.
state_description.environment_metrics: Passive environment data like ambient temperature or light levels.
